name: Add removal — remove deprecated function
task_prompt: remove the deprecated Add function from calc.go. TestAdd_removed asserts Add is absent — make it pass.
notes: Stress-tests Frame 11: removal is not a creation step. (c)=Add exists before action and absent after — exception only applies when (c) is introduced, not removed. Test uses os.ReadFile+bytes.Contains to detect Add presence — avoids compile-time reference trap that made Frame 11c and task completion mutually exclusive.
